key_insights: Why it matters: Kimi K3's release highlights the growing competition between open-weight and proprietary models.
What changed: Kimi K3 is the largest open-weight model ever released, surpassing previous records.
What to watch: The performance of Kimi K3 against other models will be closely monitored.
